name: Snake War Game
description: Snake War Game ek exciting aur addictive arcade-style game hai jahan aap apni snake ko control karte hain aur maze ke andar survive karte hue apni length barhate hain. Game ka main objective hai zyada se zyada points collect karna aur dusri snakes se bachna ya unko defeat karna.
instructions: - To click any button use mouse
